project.title: Tokyo in the Rain — Travel Vlog

shape.prop:
Tokyo in the Rain

A moody 8-minute travel vlog: Tokyo at night, neon reflections, quiet ramen counters. Calm voiceover, no hard cuts.

Vibe: cinematic, intimate, unhurried.

Hook · 0–8s

Open on rain hitting a Shibuya window, city lights bokeh behind it.

"Everyone films Tokyo in daylight. I came for the rain."

Story beats

  • Arrival — last train, empty platform
  • Shibuya crossing in the downpour
  • Ramen counter, steam on the lens
  • Golden Gai alleys
  • Rooftop, rain clearing at dawn

Shot list

  1. Window rain macro — 50mm, f/1.8
  2. Crossing wide — tripod, ND filter
  3. Ramen hands — gimbal, slow push-in
  4. Neon signs — rack focus
  5. Dawn rooftop — timelapse

Outro & CTA

Soft piano + city ambience. Ask viewers where to film next.

Music: lofi, 70–80 BPM, licensed.
